code_state.schema:
Table: account_balance_snapshots (account_id: bigint, apr_percentage: decimal, available_balance: decimal, created_at: datetime, current_balance: decimal, is_overdue: boolean, iso_currency_code: string, limit: decimal, min_payment_amount: decimal, next_payment_due_date: date, snapshot_date: date, source: string, synced_at: datetime, updated_at: datetime)
Table: accounts (account_id: string, apr_percentage: decimal, asset_strategy: string, available_balance: decimal, balances_last_sync_error: text, balances_last_sync_status: string, balances_last_synced_at: datetime, created_at: datetime, credit_limit: decimal, current_balance: decimal, debt_risk_flag: boolean, holder_category: string, import_timestamp: datetime, is_overdue: boolean, iso_currency_code: string, liability_details: jsonb, mask: string, min_payment_amount: decimal, name: string, next_payment_due_date: date, official_name: string, ownership_lookup_id: bigint, persistent_account_id: string, plaid_account_type: string, plaid_item_id: bigint, source: integer, source_institution: string, subtype: string, trust_code: string, type: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: active_storage_attachments (blob_id: bigint, created_at: datetime, name: string, record_id: bigint, record_type: string)
Table: active_storage_blobs (byte_size: bigint, checksum: string, content_type: string, created_at: datetime, filename: string, key: string, metadata: text, service_name: string)
Table: active_storage_variant_records (blob_id: bigint, variation_digest: string)
Table: agent_logs (action: string, created_at: datetime, details: text, persona: string, task_id: string, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: ai_workflow_runs (archived_at: datetime, correlation_id: string, created_at: datetime, description: text, metadata: jsonb, name: string, status: string, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: artifacts (artifact_type: string, created_at: datetime, lock_version: integer, name: string, owner_persona: string, payload: jsonb, phase: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: backlog_items (content: text, created_at: datetime, metadata: jsonb, priority: integer, title: string, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: enriched_transactions (confidence_level: string, created_at: datetime, logo_url: string, merchant_name: string, personal_finance_category: string, transaction_id: bigint, updated_at: datetime, website: string)
Table: fixed_incomes (created_at: datetime, face_value: decimal, holding_id: bigint, income_risk_flag: boolean, issue_date: date, maturity_date: date, updated_at: datetime, yield_percentage: decimal, yield_type: string)
Table: holdings (account_id: bigint, acquisition_date: date, asset_class: string, asset_class_derived_at: datetime, asset_class_source: string, close_price: decimal, close_price_as_of: date, cost_basis: decimal, created_at: datetime, cusip: string, disclaimers: jsonb, high_cost_flag: boolean, import_timestamp: datetime, industry: string, institution_price: decimal, institution_price_as_of: datetime, is_cash_equivalent: boolean, isin: string, iso_currency_code: string, market_identifier_code: string, market_value: decimal, maturity_date: date, name: string, proxy_security_id: string, quantity: decimal, sector: string, security_id: string, source: integer, source_institution: string, subtype: string, symbol: string, ticker_symbol: string, type: string, unrealized_gl: decimal, updated_at: datetime, vested_value: decimal, ytm: decimal)
Table: merchants (created_at: datetime, logo_url: string, long_description: text, merchant_entity_id: string, name: string, updated_at: datetime, website: string)
Table: option_contracts (contract_type: string, created_at: datetime, expiration_date: date, holding_id: bigint, strike_price: decimal, underlying_ticker: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: other_incomes (accrued_amount: decimal, amount: decimal, category: string, created_at: datetime, end_date: date, frequency: string, name: string, notes: text, start_date: date, suggested_tax_rate: decimal, taxable: boolean, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: ownership_lookups (created_at: datetime, details: text, name: string, ownership_type: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: personal_finance_categories (created_at: datetime, detailed: string, long_description: text, primary: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: plaid_api_calls (called_at: datetime, cost_cents: integer, created_at: datetime, endpoint: string, product: string, request_id: string, transaction_count: integer, updated_at: datetime)
Table: plaid_items (access_token_encrypted: text, access_token_encrypted_iv: text, created_at: datetime, holdings_synced_at: datetime, institution_id: string, institution_name: string, item_id: string, last_error: text, last_force_at: datetime, last_holdings_sync_at: datetime, last_webhook_at: datetime, liabilities_synced_at: datetime, plaid_env: string, reauth_attempts: integer, status: string, sync_cursor: string, transactions_synced_at: datetime, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: recurring_transactions (average_amount: decimal, category: string, created_at: datetime, description: string, frequency: string, last_amount: decimal, last_date: date, merchant_name: string, plaid_item_id: bigint, status: string, stream_id: string, stream_type: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: sap_messages (content: text, created_at: datetime, model: string, rag_request_id: string, role: string, sap_run_id: bigint, updated_at: datetime)
Table: sap_runs (artifact_id: integer, artifact_path: string, completed_at: datetime, conversation_type: string, correlation_id: string, created_at: datetime, error_message: text, idempotency_uuid: string, model_used: string, output_json: jsonb, phase: string, resume_token: string, started_at: datetime, status: string, task: text, title: string, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: security_enrichments (beta: decimal, change_percentage: decimal, company_name: string, created_at: datetime, current_ratio: decimal, data: jsonb, debt_to_equity: decimal, description: text, dividend_per_share: decimal, dividend_yield: decimal, enriched_at: datetime, free_cash_flow_yield: decimal, image_url: string, industry: string, market_cap: bigint, net_profit_margin: decimal, notes: jsonb, pe_ratio: decimal, price: decimal, price_to_book: decimal, roa: decimal, roe: decimal, roic: decimal, sector: string, security_id: string, source: string, status: string, updated_at: datetime, website: string)
Table: snapshots (created_at: datetime, data: jsonb, updated_at: datetime, user_id: bigint)
Table: sync_logs (created_at: datetime, error_message: text, job_id: string, job_type: string, plaid_item_id: bigint, status: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: transaction_codes (code: string, created_at: datetime, long_description: text, name: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: transaction_corrections (corrected_at: datetime, corrected_transaction_id: bigint, created_at: datetime, original_transaction_id: bigint, plaid_correction_data: jsonb, reason: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: transactions (account_id: bigint, account_owner: string, amount: decimal, authorized_date: date, authorized_datetime: datetime, category: string, check_number: string, cost_usd: decimal, counterparties: jsonb, created_at: datetime, cusip: string, date: date, datetime: datetime, dedupe_fingerprint: string, dedupe_key: string, deleted_at: datetime, dividend_type: string, fees: decimal, import_timestamp: datetime, income_usd: decimal, investment_transaction_id: string, investment_type: string, iso_currency_code: string, location: jsonb, logo_url: string, merchant_entity_id: string, merchant_id: bigint, merchant_name: string, name: string, original_description: string, payment_channel: string, payment_meta: jsonb, pending: boolean, pending_transaction_id: string, personal_finance_category_confidence_level: string, personal_finance_category_icon_url: string, personal_finance_category_id: bigint, personal_finance_category_label: string, personal_finance_category_version: string, price: decimal, quantity: decimal, security_id: string, source: string, source_institution: string, subtype: string, ticker: string, tran_code: string, transaction_code: string, transaction_code_id: bigint, transaction_id: string, transaction_type: string, type: string, unofficial_currency_code: string, updated_at: datetime, wash_sale_risk_flag: boolean, website: string)
Table: users (created_at: datetime, email: string, encrypted_password: string, family_id: string, remember_created_at: datetime, reset_password_sent_at: datetime, reset_password_token: string, roles: string, updated_at: datetime)
Table: webhook_logs (created_at: datetime, event_type: string, payload: jsonb, plaid_item_id: bigint, status: string, updated_at: datetime)
code_state.gemfile_summary: rails, propshaft, pg, puma, jbuilder, solid_cache, solid_queue, solid_cable, turbo-rails, stimulus-rails, importmap-rails, bootsnap, thruster, kamal, tzinfo-data, devise, pundit, plaid, attr_encrypted, dotenv-rails, tailwindcss-rails, view_component, commonmarker, sanitize, debug, brakeman, rubocop-rails-omakase, pry-rails, webmock, vcr, climate_control, web-console, capybara, selenium-webdriver, minitest, minitest-mock, kaminari, ai-agents
